ModMetaData.name: Jeremie 的 受精卵保管箱
ModMetaData.author: Jeremie
ModMetaData.description:
Jeremie 的 受精卵保管箱 ， 保管你的受精卵（永久！） ！
基于 边缘农科之孵蛋器 进行简单修改，创造的受精卵保管箱，能让受精卵在里面安全地存放（永久！），直到你准备好孵化它们为止。
解决了有上千个蛋，既想孵化又不想放在冰箱里导致它们被冻坏的尴尬问题。
这个idea来自于某位超凡智能某一天从旅行商处买到了3595个绮罗蛋后发生的故事（事故）。
---
[English Translation]
Jeremie's Egg Delay Hatcher, a simple mod that allows you to safely store fertilized eggs (forever) until you're ready to hatch them!
This mod is a simple modification of the Edge of Agriculture's Incubator, creating an Egg Delay Hatcher that can safely store fertilized eggs (forever) until you're ready to hatch them.
This solves the awkward problem of having thousands of eggs that you want to hatch but don't want to put in the fridge and risk them getting frozen.
The idea came from the story (accident) that happened one day when I bought 3595 Kiro Eggs from a traveling merchant.
---
感谢边缘农科之孵蛋器：https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3552532627 dll代码修改自边缘农科之孵蛋器，感谢原作者的辛勤劳动！
Thanks to Mod: https://steamcommunity.com/sharedfiles/filedetails/?id=3552532627 The dll code is modified from the mod, thanks to the original author's hard work!
